calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Certificate Of Merit Review And For Sanctions Against Plaintiff Ema Bell And Her Counsel
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Evan Smith, Esq. of Brodksy Smith (tel: 877-534-2590) for the Plaintiff.
Atty. Gary Roberts, Esq. and Stephen Watkins, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Denton US LLP (tel: 213-623-9300) for Defendant The Bugatti Group, Inc.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THE BUGATTI GROUP INC.'s Motion For Certificate Of Merit Review And For Sanctions Against Plaintiff Ema Bell And Her Counsel.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications.

Defendant's motion for certificate of merit review and sanctions is denied.

First, defendant can bring such a motion "if the trial court determines that there was no actual or threatened exposure to a listed chemical." (Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(h)(2).) Here, plaintiff dismissed this action and the court never made that predicate factual determination.

Second, defendant fails to show that "there was no credible factual basis for the certifier's belief that an exposure to a listed chemical had occurred or was threatened." (Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(h)(2).) The notebook lacked a Proposition 65 warning and the laboratory test report indicated that it contained 150,000 ppm of di(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate ("DEHP"). (Smith Dec., pars. 3-7; Watkins Dec., Ex. E.) Plaintiff also relied on the opinion of analytical chemist Dr. Lagalante, who opined that there was exposure. (Smith Dec. in Support of Fee Motion, Ex. J.) Based on this record, the court cannot conclude that the certificate of merit was frivolous.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Alesia Collins, CSR# 7751 (tel: 415-591-3333 / email: alesiacsr@yahoo.com). (301/CVA)

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Mootness Fees To Plaintiff And To Strike And/Or Tax Defendants Memorandum Of Costs

Appearances:

Atty. Gary Roberts, Esq. and Stephen Watkins, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Denton US LLP (tel: 213-623-9300) for Defendant The Bugatti Group, Inc.

Plaintiff's motion for fees and to strike defendant's costs memorandum is granted in part and denied in part (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Alesia Collins, CSR# 7751 (tel: 415-591-3333 / email: alesiacsr@yahoo.com). (301/CVA)
